arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Botafogo – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid face group leaders Botafogo in a must-win clash in the FIFA Club World Cup tonight. The Spanish side are third in the group heading into the final fixtures, where Diego Simeone’s side take on the Copa Libertadores winners. After a heavy defeat to PSG in their opening fixture, Atleti bounced back to beat […] The post Atletico Madrid vs Botafogo – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs. Botafogo: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: The scale of their defeat to PSG means they have plenty of work to do in Pasadena on Monday, and they’re taking on a Botafogo side that pulled off the upset of the tournament thus far against the European champions. Atlético Madrid’s Club World Cup hopes are still alive, but they need to win by at least three goals to qualify for the round of 16 at Botafogo’s expense.
